title: moraea undulata
intro: Moraea undulata, also known as the undulating moraea or wild gladiolus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. It is a perennial plant with sword-shaped leaves and produces white or pale yellow flowers, native to South Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Moraea undulata include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and boosting the immune system, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
